attributes.title: [MongoDB OTel] Overview
attributes.description: At-a-glance MongoDB health, throughput, cache efficiency, and connection status.

This dashboard provides at-a-glance MongoDB health and performance:
- Operation throughput (ops/sec) and average latency
- WiredTiger cache hit ratio (working set fit)
- Active and available connections
- Quick links to Operations and Capacity dashboards
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": []}}}}}, {"panelIndex": "04273993-d170-3022-66dc-db74991279f3", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 14, "w": 8, "h": 4, "i": "04273993-d170-3022-66dc-db74991279f3"}, "type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "attributes": {"title": "Operations/sec", "visualizationType": "lnsMetric", "type": "lens", "references": [], "state": {"visualization": {"layerId": "00cca87d-6933-c7de-97d4-c1208f6c0b5c", "layerType": "data", "metricAccessor": "ebc096a4-22f2-e1e2-ff95-7d91e0380b8a", "showBar": false, "applyColorTo": "background"}, "query": {"esql": "TS metrics-mongodbreceiver.otel-default

"}, "columns": [{"fieldName": "ops_rate", "columnId": "ebc096a4-22f2-e1e2-ff95-7d91e0380b8a", "label": "Operations/sec", "customLabel": true, "meta": {"type": "number", "esType": "long"}, "inMetricDimension": true, "params": {"format": {"id": "number", "params": {"decimals": 1, "suffix": "/sec"}}}}], "allColumns": [{"fieldName": "ops_rate", "columnId": "ebc096a4-22f2-e1e2-ff95-7d91e0380b8a", "label": "Operations/sec", "customLabel": true, "meta": {"type": "number", "esType": "long"}, "inMetricDimension": true, "params": {"format": {"id": "number", "params": {"decimals": 1, "suffix": "/sec"}}}}], "timeField": "@timestamp"}}}}, "internalReferences": [], "adHocDataViews": {}}}, "syncTooltips": false, "syncColors": false, "syncCursor": true, "filters": [], "query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}}}, {"panelIndex": "97fdff09-cb88-eda6-6783-edbc8311b815", "gridData": {"x": 8, "y": 14, "w": 8, "h": 4, "i": "97fdff09-cb88-eda6-6783-edbc8311b815"}, "type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "attributes": {"title": "Avg Operation Latency (ms)", "visualizationType": "lnsMetric", "type": "lens", "references": [], "state": {"visualization": {"layerId": "666f9eff-7cf5-7134-d05d-89e3d7317f50", "layerType": "data", "metricAccessor": "294668c2-e9af-9d64-7507-d2228afa37f4", "showBar": false, "applyColorTo": "background"}, "query": {"esql": "TS metrics-mongodbreceiver.otel-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "mongodbreceiver.otel"
| FORK (
    WHERE metrics.mongodb.operation.time IS NOT NULL
    | STATS op_time_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.mongodb.operation.time))
  )
  (
    WHERE metrics.mongodb.operation.count IS NOT NULL
    | STATS op_count_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.mongodb.operation.count))
  )
| STATS op_time_rate = SUM(op_time_rate), op_count_rate = SUM(op_count_rate)
| EVAL avg_latency_ms = CASE(op_count_rate > 0, op_time_rate / op_count_rate, 0)
"}, "filters": [], "datasourceStates": {"textBased": {"layers": {"666f9eff-7cf5-7134-d05d-89e3d7317f50": {"query": {"esql": "TS metrics-mongodbreceiver.otel-default

| FORK (
    WHERE metrics.mongodb.operation.time IS NOT NULL
    | STATS op_time_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.mongodb.operation.time))
  )
  (
    WHERE metrics.mongodb.operation.count IS NOT NULL
    | STATS op_count_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.mongodb.operation.count))
  )
| STATS op_time_rate = SUM(op_time_rate), op_count_rate = SUM(op_count_rate)
| EVAL avg_latency_ms = CASE(op_count_rate > 0, op_time_rate / op_count_rate, 0)
"}, "columns": [{"fieldName": "avg_latency_ms", "columnId": "294668c2-e9af-9d64-7507-d2228afa37f4", "label": "Avg Latency", "customLabel": true, "meta": {"type": "number", "esType": "long"}, "inMetricDimension": true, "params": {"format": {"id": "number", "params": {"decimals": 1}}}}], "allColumns": [{"fieldName": "avg_latency_ms", "columnId": "294668c2-e9af-9d64-7507-d2228afa37f4", "label": "Avg Latency", "customLabel": true, "meta": {"type": "number", "esType": "long"}, "inMetricDimension": true, "params": {"format": {"id": "number", "params": {"decimals": 1}}}}], "timeField": "@timestamp"}}}}, "internalReferences": [], "adHocDataViews": {}}}, "syncTooltips": false, "syncColors": false, "syncCursor": true, "filters": [], "query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}}}, {"panelIndex": "f0c9ce52-aff3-9eca-e2f5-fad820f0f753", "gridData": {"x": 16, "y": 14, "w": 8, "h": 4, "i": "f0c9ce52-aff3-9eca-e2f5-fad820f0f753"}, "type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "attributes": {"title": "Cache Hit Ratio", "visualizationType": "lnsMetric", "type": "lens", "references": [], "state": {"visualization": {"layerId": "6d5561a4-ed5f-ce5c-473f-a60cdced2353", "layerType": "data", "metricAccessor": "6d40f367-07ff-25e5-564b-3b236a251276", "showBar": false, "applyColorTo": "background"}, "query": {"esql": "TS metrics-mongodbreceiver.otel-default
